title: Device Home screen - Connection status
scenario: Device Home screen connection status indicator shows 'Connected' with green marker when headset is paired and 'Disconnected' with red marker when headset is turned off
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired and connected to the Android device.
Observe the connection status indicator on the Home screen.
Verify that the status displays 'Connected' with a green marker.
Turn off the Poly Bluetooth headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button until it powers off).
Observe the connection status indicator on the Home screen again.
Verify that the status changes to 'Disconnected' with a red marker.
expected: When the headset is paired and connected, the Home screen shows 'Connected' with a green marker. When the headset is turned off, the status changes to 'Disconnected' with a red marker.
